title: Emancipator
content:

corvette]], or [[Accuser (720 light freighter)|''Accuser'']], the [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]]|linebreak=1}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:ISD.jpg]] |name=''Emancipator'' 6|''Classic Star Wars'' 6]] reprint}}: The captain of the Star Destroyer featured in the reprint of ''Deadly Reunion'' is shown to be Piett, even though he is not identified in the text. The identification of the ship as the ''Accuser'' is drawn from the ''New Essential Guide to Characters'', which claims that Piett was the captain of the craft during ''Deadly Reunion''{{'s}} (temporarily)''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= *[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]] *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] *General [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] |crewmembers=[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] |registry= |aliases= }} Originally named the '''''Accuser''''', this [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was one of two [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyers]] captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], when it was boarded by Rebel forces under the command of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]. Renamed the '''''Emancipator''''', this ship went on to serve in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|fleet]] and was destroyed during [[Operation Shadow Hand]]. ==History== ===Imperial service=== {{Quote|He had graduated from the Academy and was assigned to a Star Destroyer, the ''Accuser''. On the occasion of his birthday, something most TIE pilots celebrate because of their rarity.|[[Winter Celchu|Winter]], about [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]]|}} The ''Accuser'' originally worked as a patrol ship in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. It was extensively modified in order to operate at optimal speed during a crisis and its crew had much experience in monitoring the shipping lanes and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] port traffic.{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=''Accuser''}} In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the ''Accuser'' was one of the ten Imperial Star Destroyers involved in the [[Battle of Turkana/Legends|Battle of Turkana]]. [[File:PiettProtonBeamCannon.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Firmus Piett/Legends|Piett's]] ''Accuser'' fires its [[proton beam cannon]] at a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]].]] In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the ''Accuser'' was modified with more modern weapons, also being fitted with a powerful [[proton beam cannon]]. The ship was placed under command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]]. When [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], a group of Star Destroyers, including the ''Accuser'' were charged to attack the planet. However they were [[Defense of Mon Calamari|intercepted]] by a Rebel fleet before reaching the system and the ''Accuser'' retreated after the rest of the fleet was destroyed. [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] served as a [[TIE pilot]] aboard the starship prior to his defection following the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]]. During the [[Yavin blockade|blockade]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], Piett's ''Accuser'' joined the [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]] under the leadership of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Amise Griff|Griff]]. Several months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the ''Accuser'' came across the planet [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]], which was claiming neutrality in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. But the Empire had learned that the planet was the site of the [[Conference of Uncommitted Worlds|Rebel conference]]. Piett had the ''Accuser'' attack Kabal. Among the craft fleeing from the planet was the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Piett's [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] pursued the Rebel craft, until it entered a [[collapsed dwarf star]]. [[File:PiettAccuser.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Piett]], aboard the ''Accuser''.]] Eight months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the ship [[Battle of the Poln system|fought]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Nuso Esva]]'s forces in the [[Poln system/Legends|Poln system]] as part of [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the ''Accuser'' fought at the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. At this time, Piett became a [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] and took command of the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]. Following the [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|Duel on Cloud City]], Admiral Piett was briefly reassigned to the ''Accuser'' to lead the fleet while the ''Executor'', under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kallic]], escorted [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].{{WEGCite|story=Temporary Reassignment|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}} When [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] operatives gathering information on the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] returned from the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] construction site hidden aboard civilian cargo vessels in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], ''Accuser'' and the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] [[Grappler (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Grappler'']] pulled the convoy out of hyperspace in search of the spies. A quick deployment of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] launched from the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] was able to neutralize the Interdictor, and in desperation, ''Accuser'' began firing on the civilians, in an attempt to get them to halt. However, ''Accuser'' was unable to prevent the information the Bothans carried from reaching the Alliance.''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' ===Capture=== {{Quote|Lieutenant Page, how did you manage to fight your way to the bridge? This is not meant to denigrate the abilities of you and your men…I realize that you and your men are exceptionally capable soldiers, and that ground combat is not my area of expertise…but those kind of odds sound overwhelming.''"
"''Well, actually, we didn't fire a shot.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Page]], regarding the capture of the ''Accuser''|{{WEGCite|story=The Deposition of General Solo|book=The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook}}}} [[File:Famous_Star_Destroyers_RotJ.png|thumb|right|250px|The ''Accuser'' (first from right, background) at the Battle of Endor.]] The ''Accuser'' participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], where it was captured by Rebel forces, along with the [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']]. The Rebels managed to capture the ship without firing a single shot. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page's]] [[Katarn Commandos]] used the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Imperial shuttle]] [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']] and stolen Imperial clearance codes to board the Star Destroyer. Solo, wearing a stolen Imperial general's uniform and posing as an Imperial officer with his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] escort, walked onto the bridge and relieved the ''Accuser's'' captain. Then he activated the ship-wide hull breach alarm and ordered the crew to abandon ship. ===New Republic service=== [[File:SoloPageAccuser.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the [[Endor strike team/Legends|Endor strike team]] prepared for boarding the ''Accuser''.]] Not long after ''Accuser'' was renamed ''Emancipator'', the vessel served as the New Republic's command ship at the [[Battle of Saijo]]. Fighter squadrons launched from the Star Destroyer engaged and defeated [[Tof starfighter]]s in the battle. It was planned to use ''Emancipator'' and ''Adjudicator'' (renamed ''Liberator'') in a Borderland campaign between Republic and Imperial space, to infiltrate Imperial territory and instigate conflict between the various feuding Imperial factions. The Rebels sent their two captured [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] to the [[Hast Shipyards]] for repairs but they were severely damaged when an Imperial fleet [[Battle of the Hast Shipyards|attacked]] the shipyards. [[File:RogueSquadron_cover_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The ''Emancipator'' during the [[First Battle of Borleias]].]] After the [[evacuation of Ciutric]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Laryn Kre'fey]] used the vessel as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in a bid to retake [[Ciutric IV|Ciutric]] from [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel|Krennel]]. It underwent extensive refitting after this operation, and returned to active duty under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ragab]].''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' When the ''Emancipator'' was finally put back into service, it boasted a number of improvements, including six [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers, improved sensors, a faster Class 1.5 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and reduced crew and gunnery requirements. It had also lost its proton beam cannon. In [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]], the ''Emancipator'' led the New Republic forces at the [[First Battle of Borleias]]. At Borleias, the ''Emancipator'' attempted to use its [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] to knock out the Imperial base's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. However, this plan was foiled when General [[Evir Derricote]] reinforced the shields with the use of an [[Alderaan Biotics]] facility. The ''Emancipator'' was hit by an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion bolt]] during the battle, but was able to withdraw. The vessel was later used with the ''Liberator'' as a feint at [[Ord Mirit]] in order to lure the [[Eviscerator/Legends|''Eviscerator'']] far from the [[Second Battle of Borleias]]. The ship later participated at the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]] where it fought on the frontline with the [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] and the ''Liberator''. The ''Emancipator'' and ''Liberator'' suffered severe damage during the [[Post–Zsinj campaigns|Post-Zsinj campaign]] and were recalled to undergo extensive repairs at the Hast shipyards. [[File:Emancipator-DE1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The ''Emancipator'' and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet passes by [[Allegiance (Allegiance-class)|''Allegiance'']] and its escorts.]] The ''Emancipator'' fought at the [[Battle of Ciutric]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. The battle resulted in the death of Admiral Krennel and in the liberation of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] it fought at the [[Second Battle of Coruscant]], where it carried [[Rogue Wing]]. [[Kane Griggs]] served as its navigator and [[Zevulon Veers]] was its chief gunner. [[File:EmancipatorsFate.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The ''Emancipator'' is destroyed by a [[World Devastator]].]] The ''Emancipator'' served valiantly in the [[Battle of Calamari]] where it led the New Republic fleet. Under the command of [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], it destroyed the Imperial command ship [[Allegiance (Allegiance-class)|''Allegiance'']], buying valuable time to reinforce the frantic defenders. It launched an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and [[V-wing airspeeder|V-wing]] attack upon the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[World Devastator]]s. The Republic fleet eventually arrived, but not in time to save the ''Emancipator'' from being consumed by one of the World Devastators, ''[[Silencer-7]]''.''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' ==Behind the scenes== ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' identifies one of the Star Destroyer seen in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] as the ''Accuser''. ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' in its Scene by Scene feature for ''[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|Empire Strikes Back]]'' (Scene: ESB-2 Shot 1 in combination with ESB-16 Shot 1), ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' and ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' both classify the ''Accuser'' as an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], while ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' also describes the vessel as a "standard Imperial Star Destroyer." The ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' on the other hand describes it as ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer and the ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' designates it as a [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]. ==Appearances== [[File:Accuser-Adjudicator-Stalker_TESB.jpg|250px|thumb|''Accuser'' (left), ''Adjudicator'' (center), and ''Stalker'' (right) shortly before the Battle of Hoth]] *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' *"[[Deadly Reunion]]" {{Reprint|Deadly Reunion}}
